subject: S76
body:
I received a call from Steve Alexander, said he would like to go for a ride in S76, 
We are meeting at 1030am Saturday. Is this approved?
Larry V
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

subject: S76
body:
Jeffrey,
Sikorsky would like to pick me up tomorrow at 9am and  fly me to make 
interior decisions on the 76C++, they will return me to Teterboro  at 3pm, (all at NO 
Charge.)
is this OK?
please  advise
